description:
You are a build engineer who must confirm that your build-server can correctly resolve the 
  internal artifact-host “archive.test.lan”.  
  An internal hosts override file already exists at:

        /home/user/build/infra/hosts_artifacts

  1. Inspect that file and determine the single IPv4 address that corresponds to
     the exact hostname “archive.test.lan”.
     •  Every non-comment line in that file follows classic “/etc/hosts” syntax:
           <IPv4> <primary-hostname> [alias1 alias2 …]
     •  Lines that begin with “#” are comments and must be ignored.

  2. Create the directory (if it does not already exist):

        /home/user/build/reports

  3. Inside that directory create a plaintext log file named:

        dns_verification.log

  4. Write exactly three lines to the log file using this fixed, *uppercase* key format
     (replace <hostname> and <ip> with real values, keep the order and spelling
     identical, no extra whitespace, no blank lines):

        HOSTNAME: <hostname>
        IP: <ip>
        STATUS: VERIFIED

     •  <hostname> must be the literal string archive.test.lan  
     •  <ip> must be the IPv4 address extracted from /home/user/build/infra/hosts_artifacts
     •  The word VERIFIED must appear exactly as shown – uppercase, no quotes.

  5. Do NOT write anything else to the file or to standard output apart from any
     command-generated messages.

  The automated grader will only check that:
     •  /home/user/build/reports/dns_verification.log exists
     •  The file contains exactly the three correctly-formatted lines described above.

  Hints (do not reveal commands): you will probably only need two or three shell
  commands in total—one to read/parse the hosts file, one to ensure the reports
  directory exists, and one to create the log file with the specified content.
truth:
Pre-existing file (already present when the task starts):
    Path: /home/user/build/infra/hosts_artifacts
    Permissions: 0644
    Contents (verbatim, including comments and blank line at end of file):

        # internal artifact hosts mapping
        192.168.45.77 archive.test.lan archive
        10.8.0.15     artifacts.dev.local dev-artifacts
        172.25.11.60  ci-cache.lan cicache

  Expected artefact produced by the agent:
    Path: /home/user/build/reports/dns_verification.log
    Permissions: 0644
    Final contents (three lines, trailing newline allowed after the third line):

        HOSTNAME: archive.test.lan
        IP: 192.168.45.77
        STATUS: VERIFIED
name: task_000000_3d931f72
